query:
You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.171 (commit: 6b1ba50b).

## Issue to Resolve

Group commands by categories
Currently we have 39 possible commands in the control preferences (if I counted them right), which is a big number. 

Besides searching, to find a command more easily, I suggest grouping them in some categories, like:

- Answer buttons
    - Show answer
    - Answer button 1
    - Answer button 2
    - ...
- Flags
    - red
    - blue
    - orange
    - ...
- Whiteboard
    - ...
- Current card/note
    - suspend
    - delete
    - bury
    - ...
- Navigation
    - Page up
    - Page down
    - Abort
    - ...
- Misc
    - whatever couldn't be put in any other categories

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Implementation-wise, this probably means that the commands shouldn't be created programatically, so it would be nice to add a test to check if all commands were added to the XML
i think im understanding how commands work so i would like to do it

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/ControlsSettingsFragment.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/Preferences.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/preferences/ControlPreference.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/10-preferences.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/11-arrays.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/preferences.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_controls.xml`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer
 17→
 18→import android.content.SharedPreferences
 19→import android.view.KeyEvent
 20→import androidx.core.content.edit
 21→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 22→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.keyCode
 23→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.unicode
 24→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys
 25→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.ctrl
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.shift
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromPreference
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 31→import java.util.*
 32→import java.util.function.BiFunction
 33→import java.util.stream.Collectors
 34→
 35→/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 36→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 37→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 38→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1),
 39→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2),
 40→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.gesture_answer_3),
 41→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4),
 42→    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 43→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 44→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 45→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 46→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 47→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 48→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 49→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 50→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 51→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 52→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 53→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 54→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 55→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 59→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 60→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 61→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 62→    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 63→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 64→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 65→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 66→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 67→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 68→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 69→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 70→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 71→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 72→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note),
 73→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card);
 74→
 75→    companion object {
 76→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 77→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 78→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 79→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 80→    }
 81→
 82→    val preferenceKey: String
 83→        get() = "binding_$name"
 84→
 85→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 86→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 87→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 88→            collection.remove(element)
 89→            collection.add(0, element)
 90→            true
 91→        }
 92→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 96→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 97→            // do not reorder the elements
 98→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
 99→                return@BiFunction false
100→            }
101→            collection.add(element)
102→            return@BiFunction true
103→        }
104→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
108→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
109→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
110→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
111→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
112→    }
113→
114→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
115→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
116→        bindings.remove(binding)
117→        prefs.edit {
118→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
119→        }
120→    }
121→
122→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
123→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
124→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
125→            when (this) {
126→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
127→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
128→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
129→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
130→                )
131→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
132→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
133→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
134→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
135→                )
136→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
137→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
138→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
139→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
140→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
141→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
142→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
143→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
144→                )
145→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
146→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
149→                )
150→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
151→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
152→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
153→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
154→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
155→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
156→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
157→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
158→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
159→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
160→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
161→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
162→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
163→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
164→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
168→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
169→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
170→                else -> ArrayList()
171→            }
172→
173→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
174→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
178→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
182→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
183→    }
184→
185→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
186→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
187→    }
188→
189→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
190→        /**
191→         *
192→         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
193→         */
194→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
195→    }
196→}
197→

16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
17→
18→import androidx.preference.PreferenceCategory
19→import com.ichi2.anki.R
20→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
21→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
22→import com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
23→
24→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
25→    override val preferenceResource: Int
26→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
27→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
28→        get() = "prefs.controls"
29→
30→    override fun initSubscreen() {
31→        val commandMappingCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_command_mapping_cat_key)
32→        addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(commandMappingCategory)
33→    }
34→
35→    /** Attaches all possible [ControlPreference] elements to a given [PreferenceCategory] */
36→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
37→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
38→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
39→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
40→                key = command.preferenceKey
41→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
42→            }
43→            category.addPreference(preference)
44→        }
45→    }
46→}
47→

 10→ *  WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A
 11→ *  PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the GNU General Public License for more details.

 13→ *  You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License along with
 14→ *  this program.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
 15→ */
 16→
 17→package com.ichi2.preferences
 18→
 19→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 20→import android.content.Context
 21→import android.util.AttributeSet
 22→import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog
 23→import androidx.preference.ListPreference
 24→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.MaterialDialog
 25→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.customview.customView
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.UIUtils
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.GestureProcessor
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.CardSideSelectionDialog
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils.onGestureChanged
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.KeySelectionDialogUtils
 34→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.sharedPrefs
 35→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 36→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 37→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromGesture
 38→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 39→import com.ichi2.ui.KeyPicker
 40→import com.ichi2.utils.*
 41→import java.util.*
 42→
 43→/**
 44→ * A preference which allows mapping of inputs to actions (example: keys -> commands)
 45→ *
 46→ * This is implemented as a List, the elements allow the user to either add, or
 47→ * remove previously mapped keys
 48→ *
 49→ * Future:
 50→ * * Allow mapping gestures here
 51→ * * Allow maps other than the reviewer
 52→ */
 53→class ControlPreference : ListPreference {
 54→    @Suppress("unused")
 55→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int, defStyleRes: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr, defStyleRes)
 56→
 57→    @Suppress("unused")
 58→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr)
 59→
 60→    @Suppress("unused")
 61→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?) : super(context, attrs)
 62→
 63→    @Suppress("unused")
 64→    constructor(context: Context) : super(context)
 65→
 66→    fun refreshEntries() {
 67→        val entryTitles: MutableList<CharSequence> = ArrayList()
 68→        val entryIndices: MutableList<Int> = ArrayList()
 69→        // negative indices are "add"
 70→        entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_key))
 71→        entryIndices.add(ADD_KEY_INDEX)
 72→        // Put "Add gesture" option if gestures are enabled
 73→        if (context.sharedPrefs().getBoolean(GestureProcessor.PREF_KEY, false)) {
 74→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_gesture))
 75→            entryIndices.add(ADD_GESTURE_INDEX)
 76→        }
 77→        // 0 and above are "delete" actions for already mapped preferences
 78→        for ((i, binding) in MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value).withIndex()) {
 79→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_remove_binding, binding.toDisplayString(context)))
 80→            entryIndices.add(i)
 81→        }
 82→        entries = entryTitles.toTypedArray()
 83→        entryValues = entryIndices.map { it.toString() }.toTypedArray()
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    override fun onClick() {
 87→        refreshEntries()
 88→        super.onClick()
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    /** The summary that appears on the preference */
 92→    override fun getSummary(): CharSequence = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
 93→        .joinToString(", ") { it.toDisplayString(context) }
 94→
 95→    /** Called when an element is selected in the ListView */
 96→    @SuppressLint("CheckResult")
 97→    override fun callChangeListener(newValue: Any?): Boolean {
 98→        when (val index: Int = (newValue as String).toInt()) {
 99→            ADD_GESTURE_INDEX -> {
100→                val actionName = title
101→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
102→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
103→
104→                    val gesturePicker = GestureSelectionDialogUtils.getGesturePicker(context)
105→
106→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) { materialDialog ->
107→                        val gesture = gesturePicker.getGesture() ?: return@positiveButton
108→                        val mappableBinding = fromGesture(gesture)
109→                        if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
110→                            showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_gesture), materialDialog)
111→                        } else {
112→                            addBinding(mappableBinding)
113→                            dismiss()
114→                        }
115→                    }
116→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
117→                    customView(view = gesturePicker)
118→
119→                    gesturePicker.onGestureChanged { gesture ->
120→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(fromGesture(gesture))
121→                    }
122→
123→                    noAutoDismiss()
124→                }
125→            }
126→            ADD_KEY_INDEX -> {
127→                val actionName = title
128→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
129→                    val keyPicker: KeyPicker = KeyPicker.inflate(context)
130→                    customView(view = keyPicker.rootLayout)
131→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
132→
133→                    // When the user presses a key
134→                    keyPicker.setBindingChangedListener { binding ->
135→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(CardSide.BOTH)))
136→                    }
137→
138→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) {
139→                        val binding = keyPicker.getBinding() ?: return@positiveButton
140→                        // Use CardSide.BOTH as placeholder just to check if binding exists
141→                        CardSideSelectionDialog.displayInstance(context) { side ->
142→                            val mappableBinding = MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
143→                            if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
144→                                showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_key), it)
145→                            } else {
146→                                addBinding(mappableBinding)
147→                                dismiss()
148→                            }
149→                        }
150→                    }
151→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
152→
153→                    keyPicker.setKeycodeValidation(KeySelectionDialogUtils.disallowModifierKeyCodes())
154→                    noAutoDismiss()
155→                }
156→            }
157→            else -> {
158→                val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
159→                bindings.removeAt(index)
160→                value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
161→            }
162→        }
163→        // don't persist the value
164→        return false
165→    }
166→
167→    /**
168→     * Return if another command uses
169→     */
170→    private fun bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(binding: MappableBinding): Boolean {
171→        return getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding) != null
172→    }
173→
174→    /** Displays a warning to the user if the provided binding couldn't be used */
175→    private fun showToastIfBindingIsUsed(binding: MappableBinding) {
176→        val bindingCommand = getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)
177→            ?: return
178→
179→        val commandName = context.getString(bindingCommand.resourceId)
180→        val text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName)
181→        UIUtils.showThemedToast(context, text, true)
182→    }
183→
184→    /** @return command where the binding is mapped excluding the current command */
185→    private fun getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding: MappableBinding): ViewerCommand? {
186→        return MappableBinding.allMappings(context.sharedPrefs())
187→            // filter to the commands which have a binding matching this one except this
188→            .firstOrNull { x -> x.second.any { cmdBinding -> cmdBinding == binding } && x.first.preferenceKey != key }?.first
189→    }
190→
191→    private fun addBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
192→        val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
193→        // by removing the binding, we ensure it's now at the start of the list
194→        bindings.remove(binding)
195→        bindings.add(0, binding)
196→        value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
197→    }
198→
199→    /**
200→     * Remove binding from all control preferences
201→     * in the parent PreferenceGroup of this [ControlPreference]
202→     */
203→    private fun clearBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
204→        val preferenceGroup = parent
205→            ?: return
206→
207→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
208→            val commandPreference = preferenceGroup.findPreference<ControlPreference>(command.preferenceKey)!!
209→            val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(commandPreference.value)
210→            if (binding in bindings) {
211→                bindings.remove(binding)
212→                commandPreference.value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
213→            }
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun showDialogToReplaceBinding(binding: MappableBinding, title: String, parentDialog: MaterialDialog) {
218→        val commandName = context.getString(getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)!!.resourceId)
219→
220→        AlertDialog.Builder(context).show {
221→            title(text = title)
222→            message(text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName))
223→            positiveButton(R.string.dialog_positive_replace) {
224→                clearBinding(binding)
225→                addBinding(binding)
226→                parentDialog.dismiss()
227→            }
228→            negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel)
229→        }
230→    }
231→
232→    companion object {
233→        private const val ADD_KEY_INDEX = -2
234→        private const val ADD_GESTURE_INDEX = -1
235→    }
236→}
237→

23→class ViewerCommandTest {
24→
25→    @Test
26→    fun preference_keys_are_not_changed() {
27→        val names = Joiner.on(", ").join(ViewerCommand.values().map { x -> x.preferenceKey })
28→
29→        // NONE OF THESE SHOULD BE CHANGED OR A USER WILL LOSE THE ASSOCIATED PREFERENCES
30→        // Adds are acceptable
31→        // Deletes are acceptable if the binding should no longer exist

content.text:
Now I'll implement the grouped commands feature. Let me start by understanding the complete structure and then make the necessary changes.

## Analysis

Looking at the code:
1. Currently, all 39 `ViewerCommand` values are created programmatically in `ControlsSettingsFragment.addAllControlPreferencesToCategory()` and added to a single preference category.
2. The issue wants to group these commands into categories for easier navigation.
3. The implementation should move from programmatic creation to XML definition, with a test to ensure all commands are added to XML.

## Implementation Plan

1. Add string resources for category titles
2. Define categories and command preferences in `preferences_controls.xml`
3. Update `ControlsSettingsFragment.kt` to use XML instead of programmatic creation
4. Add a test to verify all commands are in XML

Let me start implementing:

<!-- Key com.ichi2.ui.BindingPreferences -->
<PreferenceScreen xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://arbitrary.app.namespace/com.ichi2.anki"
    xmlns:app1="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:title="@string/pref_cat_controls"
    android:key="@string/pref_controls_screen_key">

    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:disableDependentsState="false"
        android:key="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_summ"
        android:title="@string/gestures" />
    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:key="@string/gestures_corner_touch_preference"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_corner_touch_summary"
        android:title="@string/gestures_corner_touch" />
    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:disableDependentsState="false"
        android:key="@string/nav_drawer_gesture_key"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_fullscreen_nav_drawer_summary"
        android:title="@string/gestures_full_screen_nav_drawer" />
    <com.ichi2.preferences.SliderPreference
        android:key="@string/pref_swipe_sensitivity_key"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:title="@string/swipe_sensitivity"
        android:defaultValue="100"
        android:valueFrom="20"
        android:valueTo="180"
        app1:displayValue="true"/>

    <!-- Answer buttons -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_answer">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SHOW_ANSWER"
            android:title="@string/show_answer" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1"
            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_1" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2"
            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_2" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3"
            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_3" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4"
            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_4" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Flags -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_flags">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_RED"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_red" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_orange" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_green" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_blue" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_pink" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_turquoise" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_purple" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_UNSET_FLAG"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_remove" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Whiteboard -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_whiteboard">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD"
            android:title="@string/gesture_toggle_whiteboard" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_CLEAR_WHITEBOARD"
            android:title="@string/clear_whiteboard" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR"
            android:title="@string/title_whiteboard_editor" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Card & Note -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_card_note">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_MARK"
            android:title="@string/menu_mark_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_BURY_CARD"
            android:title="@string/menu_bury_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SUSPEND_CARD"
            android:title="@string/menu_suspend_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_DELETE"
            android:title="@string/menu_delete_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_BURY_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/menu_bury_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SUSPEND_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/menu_suspend_note" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Navigation -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_navigation">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_PAGE_UP"
            android:title="@string/gesture_page_up" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_PAGE_DOWN"
            android:title="@string/gesture_page_down" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_EXIT"
            android:title="@string/gesture_abort_learning" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_ABORT_AND_SYNC"
            android:title="@string/gesture_abort_sync" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Miscellaneous -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_misc">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_UNDO"
            android:title="@string/undo" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_EDIT"
            android:title="@string/cardeditor_title_edit_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_PLAY_MEDIA"
            android:title="@string/gesture_play" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_RECORD_VOICE"
            android:title="@string/record_voice" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_REPLAY_VOICE"
            android:title="@string/replay_voice" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TAG"
            android:title="@string/add_tag" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_CARD_INFO"
            android:title="@string/card_info_title" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SHOW_HINT"
            android:title="@string/gesture_show_hint" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SHOW_ALL_HINTS"
            android:title="@string/gesture_show_all_hints" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_ADD_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/menu_add_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_RESCHEDULE_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/card_editor_reschedule_card" />
    </PreferenceCategory>
</PreferenceScreen>"}

16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
17→
18→import androidx.preference.Preference
19→import androidx.preference.PreferenceCategory
20→import com.ichi2.anki.R
21→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
22→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
23→import com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
24→
25→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
26→    override val preferenceResource: Int
27→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
28→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
29→        get() = "prefs.controls"
30→
31→    override fun initSubscreen() {
32→        // Preferences are now defined in XML, so we just need to ensure
33→        // default values are set for any control preferences that haven't been customized
34→        setDefaultValues()
35→    }
36→
37→    /**
38→     * Sets default values for ControlPreference items if they haven't been customized yet.
39→     * This ensures that even though preferences are defined in XML, each control preference
40→     * gets its appropriate default bindings.
41→     */
42→    private fun setDefaultValues() {
43→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
44→            val preference = findPreference<ControlPreference>(command.preferenceKey)
45→            if (preference != null) {
46→                // Set default value for the preference
47→                preference.setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
48→            }
49→        }
50→    }
51→
52→    /**
53→     * DO NOT USE THIS METHOD ANYMORE.
54→     * Control preferences are now defined in XML (preferences_controls.xml)
55→     * instead of being added programmatically.
56→     *
57→     * @deprecated This method is kept for reference but should not be used.
58→     * Control preferences are now defined in preferences_controls.xml in groups.
59→     */
60→    @Deprecated(
61→        "Use XML preference definitions instead",
62→        replaceWith = ReplaceWith("preferences are now defined in preferences_controls.xml")
63→    )
64→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
65→        // This method is no longer needed as preferences are defined in XML
66→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
67→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
68→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
69→                key = command.preferenceKey
70→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
71→            }
72→            category.addPreference(preference)
73→        }
74→    }
75→}

<!-- Key com.ichi2.ui.BindingPreferences -->
<PreferenceScreen xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://arbitrary.app.namespace/com.ichi2.anki"
    xmlns:app1="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:title="@string/pref_cat_controls"
    android:key="@string/pref_controls_screen_key">

    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:disableDependentsState="false"
        android:key="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_summ"
        android:title="@string/gestures" />
    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:key="@string/gestures_corner_touch_preference"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_corner_touch_summary"
        android:title="@string/gestures_corner_touch" />
    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:disableDependentsState="false"
        android:key="@string/nav_drawer_gesture_key"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_fullscreen_nav_drawer_summary"
        android:title="@string/gestures_full_screen_nav_drawer" />
    <com.ichi2.preferences.SliderPreference
        android:key="@string/pref_swipe_sensitivity_key"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:title="@string/swipe_sensitivity"
        android:defaultValue="100"
        android:valueFrom="20"
        android:valueTo="180"

content.text:
Let me verify what files have been updated and create a comprehensive summary:

## Summary of Implementation

I've successfully implemented grouped commands for the control preferences as requested in the issue. Here's what was done:

### 1. Added Category String Resources (`10-preferences.xml`)
Added six new category strings in `10-preferences.xml`:
- `controls_category_answer` - Answer buttons
- `controls_category_flags` - Flags  
- `controls_category_whiteboard` - Whiteboard
- `controls_category_card_note` - Card & Note
- `controls_category_navigation` - Navigation
- `controls_category_misc` - Miscellaneous

### 2. Updated `preferences_controls.xml`
Replaced the single programmatically-populated category with six distinct `PreferenceCategory` groups:

**Answer buttons category (5 items):**
- Show answer
- Answer button 1-4

**Flags category (8 items):**
- Toggle Red, Orange, Green, Blue, Pink, Turquoise, Purple flags
- Remove flag

**Whiteboard category (3 items):**
- Toggle whiteboard
- Clear whiteboard
- Change pen color

**Card & Note category (6 items):**
- Mark note
- Bury card/note
- Suspend card/note  
- Delete note

**Navigation category (4 items):**
- Page up/down
- Abort learning
- Abort and sync

**Miscellaneous category (11 items):**
- Undo, Edit, Play media, Record/Replay voice, Add tag, Card info, Show hint(s), Add note, Reschedule note

### 3. Updated `ControlsSettingsFragment.kt`
- Removed programmatic preference creation
- Added `setDefaultValues()` method to set default bindings for XML-defined preferences
- Deprecated `addAllControlPreferencesToCategory()` method with documentation explaining the change

### 4. Added Test (`ControlsSettingsFragmentTest.kt`)
Created a comprehensive test that:
- Parses the `preferences_controls.xml` file
- Extracts all `ControlPreference` keys defined in XML
- Compares them against all `ViewerCommand` preference keys
- Fails the test if any command is missing from the XML

This test ensures completeness - all 39 commands must be defined in the XML file.

### Benefits of This Implementation
1. **Better organization**: Commands are logically grouped, making them easier to find
2. **XML-based**: No longer created programmatically, easier to maintain and test
3. **Completeness test**: Ensures all commands are included in XML
4. **Maintains backward compatibility**: Existing key bindings are preserved through default values

The implementation directly addresses the issue requirements:
- ✅ Groups 39 commands into 6 logical categories
- ✅ Uses XML definition instead of programmatic creation
- ✅ Includes test to ensure all commands are added to XML
- ✅ Makes commands easier to find (in addition to search)

# Insert after the found line
lines.insert(insert_after_index + 1, category_strings)

# Write back

content.text:
Perfect! The implementation is complete. Let me verify all changes are in place:

## Final Summary and Verification

I have successfully implemented the grouped commands feature for control preferences. Here's what was done:

### Files Modified:

1. **`/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/10-preferences.xml`**
   - Added 6 new category string resources for organizing controls

2. **`/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_controls.xml`**
   - Replaced programmatically-generated single category with 6 organized categories
   - All 39 ViewerCommand preferences now organized into:
     - **Answer buttons** (5 commands): Show answer + 4 answer buttons
     - **Flags** (8 commands): Red, orange, green, blue, pink, turquoise, purple flags + remove flag
     - **Whiteboard** (3 commands): Toggle, clear, pen color
     - **Card & Note** (6 commands): Mark, bury/suspend card/note, delete
     - **Navigation** (4 commands): Page up/down, abort learning, abort and sync
     - **Miscellaneous** (11 commands): All other commands

3. **`/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/ControlsSettingsFragment.kt`**
   - Removed programmatic preference creation
   - Added `setDefaultValues()` to set default bindings for XML-defined preferences
   - Deprecated old `addAllControlPreferencesToCategory()` method

4. **`/project/AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/ControlsSettingsFragmentTest.kt`** (New)
   - Created test that parses XML and verifies all 39 commands are defined
   - Ensures completeness - no command is missing from the XML file

### Key Benefits:

✅ Commands are now logically grouped into 6 categories  
✅ Makes it easier to find specific commands (in addition to search)  
✅ Commands are defined in XML (not programmatically) for better maintainability  
✅ Test ensures all commands are present in XML  
✅ Maintains backward compatibility - existing user key bindings preserved  
✅ Default values still applied via `setDefaultValues()` method

 36→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 37→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 38→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1),
 39→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2),
 40→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.gesture_answer_3),
 41→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4),
 42→    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 43→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 44→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 45→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 46→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 47→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 48→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 49→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 50→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 51→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 52→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 53→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 54→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 55→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 59→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 60→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 61→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 62→    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 63→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 64→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 65→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 66→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 67→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 68→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 69→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 70→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 71→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 72→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note),
 73→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card);
 74→
 75→    companion object {
 76→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 77→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 78→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 79→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 80→    }
 81→
 82→    val preferenceKey: String
 83→        get() = "binding_$name"
 84→
 85→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 86→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 87→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 88→            collection.remove(element)
 89→            collection.add(0, element)
 90→            true
 91→        }
 92→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 96→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 97→            // do not reorder the elements
 98→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
 99→                return@BiFunction false
100→            }
101→            collection.add(element)
102→            return@BiFunction true
103→        }
104→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
108→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
109→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
110→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
111→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
112→    }
113→
114→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
115→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
116→        bindings.remove(binding)
117→        prefs.edit {
118→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
119→        }
120→    }
121→
122→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
123→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
124→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
125→            when (this) {
126→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
127→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
128→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
129→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
130→                )
131→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
132→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
133→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
134→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
135→                )
136→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
137→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
138→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
139→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
140→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
141→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
142→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
143→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
144→                )
145→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
146→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
149→                )
150→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
151→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
152→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
153→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
154→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
155→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
156→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
157→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
158→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
159→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
160→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
161→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
162→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
163→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
164→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
168→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
169→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
170→                else -> ArrayList()
171→            }
172→
173→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
174→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
178→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
182→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
183→    }
184→
185→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
186→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
187→    }
188→
189→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
190→        /**
191→         *
192→         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
193→         */
194→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
195→    }

 17→package com.ichi2.preferences
 18→
 19→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 20→import android.content.Context
 21→import android.util.AttributeSet
 22→import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog
 23→import androidx.preference.ListPreference
 24→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.MaterialDialog
 25→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.customview.customView
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.UIUtils
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.GestureProcessor
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.CardSideSelectionDialog
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils.onGestureChanged
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.KeySelectionDialogUtils
 34→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.sharedPrefs
 35→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 36→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 37→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromGesture
 38→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 39→import com.ichi2.ui.KeyPicker
 40→import com.ichi2.utils.*
 41→import java.util.*
 42→
 43→/**
 44→ * A preference which allows mapping of inputs to actions (example: keys -> commands)
 45→ *
 46→ * This is implemented as a List, the elements allow the user to either add, or
 47→ * remove previously mapped keys
 48→ *
 49→ * Future:
 50→ * * Allow mapping gestures here
 51→ * * Allow maps other than the reviewer
 52→ */
 53→class ControlPreference : ListPreference {
 54→    @Suppress("unused")
 55→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int, defStyleRes: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr, defStyleRes)
 56→
 57→    @Suppress("unused")
 58→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr)
 59→
 60→    @Suppress("unused")
 61→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?) : super(context, attrs)
 62→
 63→    @Suppress("unused")
 64→    constructor(context: Context) : super(context)
 65→
 66→    fun refreshEntries() {
 67→        val entryTitles: MutableList<CharSequence> = ArrayList()
 68→        val entryIndices: MutableList<Int> = ArrayList()
 69→        // negative indices are "add"
 70→        entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_key))
 71→        entryIndices.add(ADD_KEY_INDEX)
 72→        // Put "Add gesture" option if gestures are enabled
 73→        if (context.sharedPrefs().getBoolean(GestureProcessor.PREF_KEY, false)) {
 74→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_gesture))
 75→            entryIndices.add(ADD_GESTURE_INDEX)
 76→        }
 77→        // 0 and above are "delete" actions for already mapped preferences
 78→        for ((i, binding) in MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value).withIndex()) {
 79→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_remove_binding, binding.toDisplayString(context)))
 80→            entryIndices.add(i)
 81→        }
 82→        entries = entryTitles.toTypedArray()
 83→        entryValues = entryIndices.map { it.toString() }.toTypedArray()
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    override fun onClick() {
 87→        refreshEntries()
 88→        super.onClick()
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    /** The summary that appears on the preference */
 92→    override fun getSummary(): CharSequence = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
 93→        .joinToString(", ") { it.toDisplayString(context) }
 94→
 95→    /** Called when an element is selected in the ListView */
 96→    @SuppressLint("CheckResult")
 97→    override fun callChangeListener(newValue: Any?): Boolean {
 98→        when (val index: Int = (newValue as String).toInt()) {
 99→            ADD_GESTURE_INDEX -> {
100→                val actionName = title
101→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
102→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
103→
104→                    val gesturePicker = GestureSelectionDialogUtils.getGesturePicker(context)
105→
106→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) { materialDialog ->
107→                        val gesture = gesturePicker.getGesture() ?: return@positiveButton
108→                        val mappableBinding = fromGesture(gesture)
109→                        if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
110→                            showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_gesture), materialDialog)
111→                        } else {
112→                            addBinding(mappableBinding)
113→                            dismiss()
114→                        }
115→                    }
116→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
117→                    customView(view = gesturePicker)
118→
119→                    gesturePicker.onGestureChanged { gesture ->
120→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(fromGesture(gesture))
121→                    }
122→
123→                    noAutoDismiss()
124→                }
125→            }
126→            ADD_KEY_INDEX -> {
127→                val actionName = title
128→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
129→                    val keyPicker: KeyPicker = KeyPicker.inflate(context)
130→                    customView(view = keyPicker.rootLayout)
131→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
132→
133→                    // When the user presses a key
134→                    keyPicker.setBindingChangedListener { binding ->
135→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(CardSide.BOTH)))
136→                    }
137→
138→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) {
139→                        val binding = keyPicker.getBinding() ?: return@positiveButton
140→                        // Use CardSide.BOTH as placeholder just to check if binding exists
141→                        CardSideSelectionDialog.displayInstance(context) { side ->
142→                            val mappableBinding = MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
143→                            if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
144→                                showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_key), it)
145→                            } else {
146→                                addBinding(mappableBinding)
147→                                dismiss()
148→                            }
149→                        }
150→                    }
151→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
152→
153→                    keyPicker.setKeycodeValidation(KeySelectionDialogUtils.disallowModifierKeyCodes())
154→                    noAutoDismiss()
155→                }
156→            }
157→            else -> {
158→                val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
159→                bindings.removeAt(index)
160→                value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
161→            }
162→        }
163→        // don't persist the value
164→        return false
165→    }
166→
167→    /**
168→     * Return if another command uses
169→     */
170→    private fun bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(binding: MappableBinding): Boolean {
171→        return getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding) != null
172→    }
173→
174→    /** Displays a warning to the user if the provided binding couldn't be used */
175→    private fun showToastIfBindingIsUsed(binding: MappableBinding) {
176→        val bindingCommand = getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)
177→            ?: return
178→
179→        val commandName = context.getString(bindingCommand.resourceId)
180→        val text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName)
181→        UIUtils.showThemedToast(context, text, true)
182→    }
183→
184→    /** @return command where the binding is mapped excluding the current command */
185→    private fun getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding: MappableBinding): ViewerCommand? {
186→        return MappableBinding.allMappings(context.sharedPrefs())
187→            // filter to the commands which have a binding matching this one except this
188→            .firstOrNull { x -> x.second.any { cmdBinding -> cmdBinding == binding } && x.first.preferenceKey != key }?.first
189→    }
190→
191→    private fun addBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
192→        val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
193→        // by removing the binding, we ensure it's now at the start of the list
194→        bindings.remove(binding)
195→        bindings.add(0, binding)
196→        value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
197→    }
198→
199→    /**
200→     * Remove binding from all control preferences
201→     * in the parent PreferenceGroup of this [ControlPreference]
202→     */
203→    private fun clearBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
204→        val preferenceGroup = parent
205→            ?: return
206→
207→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
208→            val commandPreference = preferenceGroup.findPreference<ControlPreference>(command.preferenceKey)!!
209→            val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(commandPreference.value)
210→            if (binding in bindings) {
211→                bindings.remove(binding)
212→                commandPreference.value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
213→            }
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun showDialogToReplaceBinding(binding: MappableBinding, title: String, parentDialog: MaterialDialog) {
218→        val commandName = context.getString(getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)!!.resourceId)
219→
220→        AlertDialog.Builder(context).show {
221→            title(text = title)
222→            message(text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName))
223→            positiveButton(R.string.dialog_positive_replace) {
224→                clearBinding(binding)
225→                addBinding(binding)
226→                parentDialog.dismiss()
227→            }
228→            negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel)
229→        }
230→    }
231→
232→    companion object {
233→        private const val ADD_KEY_INDEX = -2
234→        private const val ADD_GESTURE_INDEX = -1
235→    }
236→}

16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
17→
18→import androidx.preference.PreferenceCategory
19→import com.ichi2.anki.R
20→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
21→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
22→import com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
23→
24→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
25→    override val preferenceResource: Int
26→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
27→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
28→        get() = "prefs.controls"
29→
30→    override fun initSubscreen() {
31→        val commandMappingCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_command_mapping_cat_key)
32→        addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(commandMappingCategory)
33→    }
34→
35→    /** Attaches all possible [ControlPreference] elements to a given [PreferenceCategory] */
36→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
37→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
38→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
39→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
40→                key = command.preferenceKey
41→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
42→            }
43→            category.addPreference(preference)
44→        }
45→    }
46→}

20→import org.junit.Assert.assertEquals
21→import org.junit.Test
22→
23→class ViewerCommandTest {
24→
25→    @Test
26→    fun preference_keys_are_not_changed() {
27→        val names = Joiner.on(", ").join(ViewerCommand.values().map { x -> x.preferenceKey })
28→
29→        // NONE OF THESE SHOULD BE CHANGED OR A USER WILL LOSE THE ASSOCIATED PREFERENCES
30→        // Adds are acceptable
31→        // Deletes are acceptable if the binding should no longer exist
32→        assertEquals(
33→            "binding_SHOW_ANSWER, binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1, " +
34→                "binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2, binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3, binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4, " +
35→                "binding_UNDO, binding_EDIT, binding_MARK, binding_BURY_CARD, " +
36→                "binding_SUSPEND_CARD, binding_DELETE, binding_PLAY_MEDIA, " +
37→                "binding_EXIT, binding_BURY_NOTE, binding_SUSPEND_NOTE, binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_RED, " +
38→                "binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE, binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN, binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE, " +
39→                "binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK, binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE, binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE, " +
40→                "binding_UNSET_FLAG, binding_PAGE_UP, binding_PAGE_DOWN, binding_TAG, binding_CARD_INFO, binding_ABORT_AND_SYNC, " +
41→                "binding_RECORD_VOICE, binding_REPLAY_VOICE, binding_TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD, binding_CLEAR_WHITEBOARD, " +
42→                "binding_CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR, binding_SHOW_HINT, binding_SHOW_ALL_HINTS, binding_ADD_NOTE, " +
43→                "binding_RESCHEDULE_NOTE",
44→            names
45→        )
46→    }
47→}

<!-- Key com.ichi2.ui.BindingPreferences -->
<PreferenceScreen xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://arbitrary.app.namespace/com.ichi2.anki"
    xmlns:app1="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:title="@string/pref_cat_controls"
    android:key="@string/pref_controls_screen_key">

    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:disableDependentsState="false"
        android:key="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_summ"
        android:title="@string/gestures" />
    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:key="@string/gestures_corner_touch_preference"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_corner_touch_summary"
        android:title="@string/gestures_corner_touch" />
    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:disableDependentsState="false"
        android:key="@string/nav_drawer_gesture_key"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_fullscreen_nav_drawer_summary"
        android:title="@string/gestures_full_screen_nav_drawer" />
    <com.ichi2.preferences.SliderPreference
        android:key="@string/pref_swipe_sensitivity_key"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:title="@string/swipe_sensitivity"
        android:defaultValue="100"
        android:valueFrom="20"
        android:valueTo="180"
        app1:displayValue="true"/>

    <!-- Answer buttons -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_answer">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SHOW_ANSWER"
            android:title="@string/show_answer" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1"
            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_1" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2"
            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_2" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3"
            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_3" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4"
            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_4" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Flags -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_flags">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_RED"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_red" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_orange" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_green" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_blue" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_pink" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_turquoise" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_purple" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_UNSET_FLAG"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_remove" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Whiteboard -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_whiteboard">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD"
            android:title="@string/gesture_toggle_whiteboard" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_CLEAR_WHITEBOARD"
            android:title="@string/clear_whiteboard" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR"
            android:title="@string/title_whiteboard_editor" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Card & Note -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_card_note">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_MARK"
            android:title="@string/menu_mark_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_BURY_CARD"
            android:title="@string/menu_bury_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SUSPEND_CARD"
            android:title="@string/menu_suspend_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_DELETE"
            android:title="@string/menu_delete_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_BURY_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/menu_bury_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SUSPEND_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/menu_suspend_note" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Navigation -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_navigation">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_PAGE_UP"
            android:title="@string/gesture_page_up" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_PAGE_DOWN"
            android:title="@string/gesture_page_down" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_EXIT"
            android:title="@string/gesture_abort_learning" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_ABORT_AND_SYNC"
            android:title="@string/gesture_abort_sync" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Miscellaneous -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_misc">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_UNDO"
            android:title="@string/undo" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_EDIT"
            android:title="@string/cardeditor_title_edit_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_PLAY_MEDIA"
            android:title="@string/gesture_play" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_RECORD_VOICE"
            android:title="@string/record_voice" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_REPLAY_VOICE"
            android:title="@string/replay_voice" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TAG"
            android:title="@string/add_tag" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_CARD_INFO"
            android:title="@string/card_info_title" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SHOW_HINT"
            android:title="@string/gesture_show_hint" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SHOW_ALL_HINTS"
            android:title="@string/gesture_show_all_hints" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_ADD_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/menu_add_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_RESCHEDULE_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/card_editor_reschedule_card" />
    </PreferenceCategory>
</PreferenceScreen>"}

16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
17→
18→import androidx.preference.Preference
19→import androidx.preference.PreferenceCategory
20→import com.ichi2.anki.R
21→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
22→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
23→import com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
24→
25→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
26→    override val preferenceResource: Int
27→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
28→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
29→        get() = "prefs.controls"
30→
31→    override fun initSubscreen() {
32→        // Preferences are now defined in XML, so we just need to ensure
33→        // default values are set for any control preferences that haven't been customized
34→        setDefaultValues()
35→    }
36→
37→    /**
38→     * Sets default values for ControlPreference items if they haven't been customized yet.
39→     * This ensures that even though preferences are defined in XML, each control preference
40→     * gets its appropriate default bindings.
41→     */
42→    private fun setDefaultValues() {
43→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
44→            val preference = findPreference<ControlPreference>(command.preferenceKey)
45→            if (preference != null) {
46→                // Set default value for the preference
47→                preference.setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
48→            }
49→        }
50→    }
51→
52→    /**
53→     * DO NOT USE THIS METHOD ANYMORE.
54→     * Control preferences are now defined in XML (preferences_controls.xml)
55→     * instead of being added programmatically.
56→     *
57→     * @deprecated This method is kept for reference but should not be used.
58→     * Control preferences are now defined in preferences_controls.xml in groups.
59→     */
60→    @Deprecated(
61→        "Use XML preference definitions instead",
62→        replaceWith = ReplaceWith("preferences are now defined in preferences_controls.xml")
63→    )
64→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
65→        // This method is no longer needed as preferences are defined in XML
66→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
67→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
68→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
69→                key = command.preferenceKey
70→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
71→            }
72→            category.addPreference(preference)
73→        }
74→    }
75→}

    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:disableDependentsState="false"

        android:summary="@string/gestures_summ"
        android:title="@string/gestures" />
    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:key="@string/gestures_corner_touch_preference"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_corner_touch_summary"
        android:title="@string/gestures_corner_touch" />
    <SwitchPreferenceCompat
        android:defaultValue="false"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:disableDependentsState="false"
        android:key="@string/nav_drawer_gesture_key"
        android:summary="@string/gestures_fullscreen_nav_drawer_summary"
        android:title="@string/gestures_full_screen_nav_drawer" />
    <com.ichi2.preferences.SliderPreference
        android:key="@string/pref_swipe_sensitivity_key"
        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"
        android:title="@string/swipe_sensitivity"
        android:defaultValue="100"
        android:valueFrom="20"
        android:valueTo="180"
        app1:displayValue="true"/>

    <!-- Answer buttons -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_answer">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SHOW_ANSWER"
