            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_3" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4"
            android:title="@string/gesture_answer_4" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Flags -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_flags">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_RED"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_red" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_orange" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_green" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_blue" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_pink" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_turquoise" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_purple" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_UNSET_FLAG"
            android:title="@string/gesture_flag_remove" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Whiteboard -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_whiteboard">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD"
            android:title="@string/gesture_toggle_whiteboard" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_CLEAR_WHITEBOARD"
            android:title="@string/clear_whiteboard" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR"
            android:title="@string/title_whiteboard_editor" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Card & Note -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_card_note">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_MARK"
            android:title="@string/menu_mark_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_BURY_CARD"
            android:title="@string/menu_bury_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SUSPEND_CARD"
            android:title="@string/menu_suspend_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_DELETE"
            android:title="@string/menu_delete_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_BURY_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/menu_bury_note" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SUSPEND_NOTE"

    <!-- Navigation -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_navigation">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_PAGE_UP"
            android:title="@string/gesture_page_up" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_PAGE_DOWN"
            android:title="@string/gesture_page_down" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_EXIT"

        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_ABORT_AND_SYNC"
            android:title="@string/gesture_abort_sync" />
    </PreferenceCategory>

    <!-- Miscellaneous -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_misc">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_UNDO"
            android:title="@string/undo" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_EDIT"
            android:title="@string/cardeditor_title_edit_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_PLAY_MEDIA"
            android:title="@string/gesture_play" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_RECORD_VOICE"
            android:title="@string/record_voice" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_REPLAY_VOICE"
            android:title="@string/replay_voice" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_TAG"
            android:title="@string/add_tag" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_CARD_INFO"
            android:title="@string/card_info_title" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SHOW_HINT"
            android:title="@string/gesture_show_hint" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_SHOW_ALL_HINTS"

        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference

            android:key="binding_RESCHEDULE_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/card_editor_reschedule_card" />
    </PreferenceCategory>
</PreferenceScreen>'''

file_path = "/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_controls.xml"
with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(content)

print(f"Successfully updated {file_path}")

{"command":"python3 << 'PYTHON_EOF'
# Read the file
with open("/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/10-preferences.xml", 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

# Find the line to insert after (line with controls_main_category)
insert_after_index = None
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if 'controls_main_category' in line and 'maxLength="41"' in line:
        insert_after_index = i
        break

if insert_after_index is None:
    print("Could not find insertion point")
    exit(1)

# Insert the category strings
category_strings = '''
    <!-- Control categories -->
    <string name="controls_category_answer" maxLength="41">Answer buttons</string>
    <string name="controls_category_flags" maxLength="41">Flags</string>
    <string name="controls_category_whiteboard" maxLength="41">Whiteboard</string>
    <string name="controls_category_card_note" maxLength="41">Card & Note</string>
    <string name="controls_category_navigation" maxLength="41">Navigation</string>
    <string name="controls_category_misc" maxLength="41">Miscellaneous</string>


    <!-- studyoptions -->'''

# Insert after the found line
lines.insert(insert_after_index + 1, category_strings)

# Write back
with open("/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/10-preferences.xml", 'w') as f:
    f.writelines(lines)

print("Successfully added category strings to 10-preferences.xml")

        android:title="@string/gestures_full_screen_nav_drawer" />

        android:dependency="@string/gestures_preference"

        android:valueFrom="20"
        android:valueTo="180"

    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_answer">

            android:key="binding_BURY_CARD"
            android:title="@string/menu_bury_card" />
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference

    <!-- Navigation -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_navigation">
        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference

            android:key="binding_PAGE_DOWN"
            android:title="@string/gesture_page_down" />

            android:key="binding_ABORT_AND_SYNC"

    <!-- Miscellaneous -->
    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/controls_category_misc">

        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference

        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference

        <com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
            android:key="binding_RESCHEDULE_NOTE"
            android:title="@string/card_editor_reschedule_card" />
    </PreferenceCategory>
</PreferenceScreen>'''
